overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban commercial district. The player character moves from a neon-lit street bar through sunlit plazas with digital billboards, past police officers, and up stairs to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food bar under concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking past the circular J-Bar with purple neon lighting and red canopy

notable_agents.action: person in yellow plaid shirt sitting on bar stool drinking
bartender serving drinks behind the purple counter

entered.detail: circular bar with bright purple neon lighting and stools around the perimeter
red circular roof structure with green J-BAR neon signage
large concrete highway overpass providing shelter overhead
large digital screen displaying NEW HERO advertisement

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past a circular street bar with vibrant purple neon lighting and a red canopy, situated under a concrete overpass. Several patrons sit on stools around the counter while others stand nearby in the sheltered pedestrian area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with digital billboards

events.description: exits covered bar area into open sunlit plaza with palm trees
approaching parked police SUV with officers standing nearby

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward a parked police vehicle

notable_agents.action: police SUV parked in the plaza with blue accent lighting
police officer standing beside the vehicle

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying REAL DATE advertisement with male figure
large concrete planters containing tall palm trees
futuristic skyscraper with glass facade rising in the background

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into a bright sunlit plaza, the view opens to reveal towering digital billboards and palm tree planters. The camera approaches a parked police SUV with officers standing nearby, surrounded by futuristic commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with exercise group and stairway approach

events.description: turns left and walks past the police vehicle
encounters group of people performing synchronized tai chi exercises

agents.ego_description: turning left past the police car and walking toward a group of people exercising

notable_agents.action: group of five people performing synchronized tai chi exercises in the plaza

entered.detail: angular red building with geometric architecture and multiple levels
wide concrete stairs with red painted walls leading upward
large wind turbine visible on the hillside in the distance

segments.scene_description: Turning left past the police vehicle, the camera moves through the plaza where a group of people are performing synchronized tai chi exercises. The scene features a prominent red building facade and a wide concrete stairway leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level pedestrian area under highway overpass

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete stairway
reaches top of stairs entering covered upper plaza area

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs to the upper level while pedestrians walk up and down

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear descending the stairs toward camera

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass covering the upper plaza
red and white concrete railing along the stairway edges
storefronts and commercial spaces under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Ascending the wide concrete stairs with red walls, the camera passes pedestrians coming down and reaches an upper level plaza sheltered beneath a massive highway overpass. The area contains small shops and continues the urban commercial environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban underpass into a bright, open commercial plaza and finally up to an elevated walkway. It begins by gliding past a circular street bar bathed in purple neon light and sheltered by a red canopy beneath a concrete overpass. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza filled with towering digital billboards, palm trees, and a parked police SUV with officers standing guard. The view then shifts left, passing a group of people performing synchronized tai chi exercises against a prominent red building facade before approaching a wide concrete stairway. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs past descending pedestrians to reach an upper-level plaza containing small shops, all sheltered beneath a massive highway overpass.
